case_title: FAN, PAUL DBA MAHOGANY PRODUCTS vs. MATTSON, MICHAEL P. DBA MATTSON SALES & MARKETING

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAN, PAUL DBA MAHOGANY PRODUCTS AS TO DEFENDANT MATTSON, MICHAEL P. DBA MATTSON SALES & MARKETING SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAN, PAUL DBA MAHOGANY PRODUCTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATTSON, MICHAEL P.
